story_summary: A blonde woman in a yellow dress teases a Yor Forger cosplay in her bedroom while an anime character insert appears in the upper right, then the clip cuts to the same woman fully transformed into a black Yor-inspired outfit in the same room.

source_sampling.method: ffprobe metadata plus scene-cut review and midpoint-frame extraction
source_sampling.notes: Scene boundary confirmed at 3.666667 seconds using ffprobe scene detection plus manual frame review. Scene_001 contains the source-authentic anime insert and question text; scene_002 is the reveal pose.

audio_notes: Audio was extracted directly from the input video into source_audio.mp3 and should be used as the default Shotstack audio source.

scenes.summary: A young blonde woman with an oversized green bow headband and a yellow strapless ribbed dress stands in a beige bedroom and looks into the phone camera while a Yor Forger anime figure insert floats in the upper-right corner.

camera.movement: handheld phone framing with subtle body sway

on_screen_text: White stroked question text reads “Yor Forger cosplay?” near the lower-middle of the frame.
A separate Yor Forger anime reference insert appears in the upper-right corner.
scenes.environment: Warm beige bedroom with a shelf of anime figures on the left and a door on the right.

scenes.summary: The same blonde woman now poses in a fitted black Yor-inspired mini dress with a black choker, arm wraps, and floral hair accessories in the same bedroom.

camera.movement: handheld phone framing with subtle pose changes

on_screen_text: No creative caption text remains after the reveal; only platform watermark UI is present.
scenes.environment: Same beige bedroom, same shelf and door placement, warmer reveal lighting.
